items.title: Global Prevention Rules
items.content:
# Prevention Rules

Generated from negative feedback memories.

## railway
- Recurrence count: 2
- Rule: 1. Always use --all or -v flags on first debug attempt. 2. Cache Railway auth locally instead of re-authenticating every session. 3. Stop making user do manual steps that should be automated.
- Latest mistake: MISTAKE: Wasted user time with 6+ debug workflow iterations. Should h
